blaze, designer

I'm a self-taught digital designer who's spent the past 15+ years creating thoughtful apps and digital products.

I enjoy simplifying complex problems into experiences people love to use.

Creator, 2025

Party
Web & Mobile

Team Designer, 2024

In recent years, I've designed digital experiences for several innovative companies. At PartyDAO (2022–present), I've contributed as a designer on party.app and World apps, shaping intuitive product experiences for users.

Before that, I was the founding designer at Showtime (2021–2022), where I led the product design direction. In 2021, I collaborated with WorkOS, creating marketing graphics and impactful visual materials.

From 2015–2017, at Bitovi, I worked on major web projects for brands like Lowe's and Levi's.

Prior to that, from 2013–2017, I explored various experimental 3D projects as a freelance designer. Early in my career, I joined Scribd (2010–2012), where I focused on designing and enhancing their primary marketing website.
